commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a WhatsApp `listGroupsLive` directory adapter backed by Baileys `groupFetchAllParticipating()`, registers it on the WhatsApp channel, expands directory tests, and adjusts one voice-call test mock type.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +204. Total +241 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. On current main the WhatsApp channel registers only config-backed `listGroups`, while the CLI prefers `listGroupsLive` when present, so an empty `channels.whatsapp.groups` map produces an empty directory without exercising the live WhatsApp memberships.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor-side real behavior proof and a small query-filter fix before normal maintainer review; ClawSweeper should not queue repair while the proof gate is mock-only.

target.title: fix(whatsapp): add listGroupsLive for real-time group directory
target.body:
## Root Cause

The WhatsApp channel directory adapter only registered `listGroups` (which reads from the config map `channels.whatsapp.groups`) but did **not** register `listGroupsLive`. The CLI (and other consumers) prefer `listGroupsLive` when available, so users who have active WhatsApp group memberships but an empty config-based groups map would see an empty directory. No `listGroupsLive` implementation existed for WhatsApp.

## Summary

- Bug: WhatsApp directory `/groups` returned empty even when the account is a member of groups, because only the config-backed `listGroups` was wired up but not the live-fetch variant.
- This PR adds `listWhatsAppDirectoryGroupsLive` that fetches groups from the Baileys socket via `groupFetchAllParticipating()`, with graceful fallback to config when the socket is unavailable or throws. The new function is registered in the channel directory adapter.
- Fixes #76722

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts` — 7/7 passed (5 new tests + 2 existing)
- `pnpm tsgo:test` — passed (type check)
- `pnpm lint:extensions:bundled` — passed
- `pnpm check:changed` — pending; extension-only changes, no core surface affected
- Autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- CI: 3 failures (check-additional-extension-bundled, check-lint, check-test-types) fixed in commit `10f5aa400d`; re-run pending

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: WhatsApp directory `/groups` now returns the account's real group memberships fetched live from the WhatsApp connection, not just config-declared groups.
Real environment tested: Linux, Node 22, branch `fix/issue-76722-whatsapp-directory-groups-live` commit `10f5aa400d`
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts
pnpm tsgo:test
pnpm lint:extensions:bundled
```
Evidence after fix:
```console
$ pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.7 /home/0668000452/codes/OPENSOURCES/openclaw

 ✓ extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts (7 tests) 9.80s
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed (7)

$ pnpm tsgo:test  # exit code 0 — no type errors
$ pnpm lint:extensions:bundled  # exit code 0 — no lint errors
```
Observed result after fix: All 7 tests pass, type check passes (fixes TS2322 on sock type), lint passes (fixes no-unnecessary-type-assertion on lines 207-208).
What was not tested: Live E2E with a real WhatsApp account (requires Crabbox with WhatsApp auth); the changes are extension-internal and follow established patterns from the Telegram channel's `listGroupsLive` implementation.
